metadata.description: Codebase-aware product specs. Set up Draftwise, scan a codebase, draft product / technical / task specs grounded in the real code (or in a greenfield plan when there's no code yet).

plugins.name: draftwise
plugins.description: Slash commands that drive the Draftwise CLI in chat — `/draftwise init`, `/draftwise new "<idea>"`, `/draftwise tech`, `/draftwise tasks`, `/draftwise scan`, `/draftwise explain`, plus list / show / scaffold. Requires the `draftwise` CLI installed via `npm i -g draftwise`.
